key: Welcome to the strategy meeting. Eduarda, would you like to start?
text: Welcome to the strategy meeting. Eduarda, would you like to start?

key: Sure. Nice to see you all again. In my view, we should act now.
text: Sure. Nice to see you all again. In my view, we should act now.

key: Interesting. Can you back that up?
text: Interesting. Can you back that up?

key: Of course. The data suggests the market will recover. If we wait, we will lose the deal.
text: Of course. The data suggests the market will recover. If we wait, we will lose the deal.

key: Sorry to jump in, but what is the downside?
text: Sorry to jump in, but what is the downside?

key: If the market falls, our capital stays protected. Anna, please go ahead.

key: Thanks. So, to sum up, we act now but stay flexible?
text: Thanks. So, to sum up, we act now but stay flexible?

key: Exactly. The key takeaway: act now, review in two weeks. Are we all on the same page?

text: Nice to see you all again. In my view, we should act now. The data suggests the market will recover. If we wait, we will lose the deal. To sum up: act now, review in two weeks. Are we all on the same page?

key: Thank you all for a clear and well-run meeting. We agreed to act now and review in two weeks. Each person has one action item. Please report back in two weeks.
